name: mcpmap
description: Inventory local Model Context Protocol configs without leaking secrets.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js --help && node dist/src/cli.js scan --config tests/fixtures/claude-desktop.json --format table && sh -c 'node dist/src/cli.js doctor --config tests/fixtures/problematic.jsonc || test $? = 1'
scripts.release:check: npm test && npm run check && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappel
